name: Payment Assistant
description: An autonomous payment agent that searches, compares, and completes purchases on your behalf — within the merchants and budget rules you define. Powered by AgentCard virtual Visa and cloud browser automation.
headline: Search, compare, and buy — hands-free within your budget rules
author: Community

formData.label: Browser Use API Key
formData.description: Required for cloud browser automation. Used to execute checkout flows on your behalf.

suggested_prompts: Buy me a Logitech K380 keyboard on Amazon, budget $60
